no: CD Twinkle by CamDawg. Makes Twinkle a proper PnP Defender weapon — allows distributing its +5 enchantment between AC and THAC0/damage (e.g. +2 AC/+3 THAC0, +5 AC/+0 THAC0, etc.). A tiny single-item tweak. Author noted Angel (MiH) volunteered to incorporate it into MiH as an item tweak, but this hasn’t happened yet. Not essential for ultimate preset.
sum: The Make Twinkle a True 'Defender' Weapon mod is a small WeiDU mod that adds the ability to the Twinkle scimitar to act as a true Defender weapon.
